rows.label: qev065205_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ah... Aaah...
I can't hear my younger sisters' voices...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065205_MSG0004
rows.name:
...That's right, yes...
I just need to discipline you with even greater power...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065205_MSG0005
rows.name:
Haven't we always used garbage-like aliens
in that way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065205_MSG0006
rows.name: This time, surely... it will go well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065205_MSG0007
rows.name:
This must be a lie...
To be done in by mere lower lifeforms...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065205_MSG0008
rows.name:
We are absolute rulers.
Even Mother said that was the providence of the universe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065205_MSG0009
rows.name:
Aah... Mother Fortun!
Please, save us![ST:wait ]
